title: No Booze In Delhi? Govt Declares 5 Dry Days; Liquor Shops To Remain Closed Between May-Sept On These Days | Check List
description: The Delhi government announced 5 dry days from May to September 2026. Liquor shops will remain closed on Buddha Purnima, Bakrid, Muharram, Independence Day and Janmashtami. Check the full Delhi dry day list and dates.
